Our Story

Eight generations,
one harbour

Paolo and Matteo Giovannini carry on a tradition begun in 1850. Raised among the aromas of family cooking and their grandmother's secrets, they have transformed Ligurian simplicity into a refined experience.

1850

Fondazione

VIII

Generazione

II

Sedi

Read our story →

Portofino by night

The magic of the harbour
after sunset

Cocktails, aperitivo and dinner on the pier. When the lights come on over the harbour, da I Gemelli becomes the beating heart of Portofino.
